zh.lifeSummary: Katherine de Cruke於1350年出生在英國英格蘭戴文素斯 塔福頓。她於1370年與John Burnell在英國英格蘭戴文素斯 塔福頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1408年在英國戴文素斯 塔福頓享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cruke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Brendan, Fergus, Kieran.

English (Lancashire) and Irish (Cork): variant of Crook . According to Woulfe, the English name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century; the Croke family settled in Kilkenny, Tipperary, and Cork, whilst Crooke represents a later immigration and is more widespread.
Americanized form of Polish   Krok   and German   Krock   or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Crook
meanings: topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine de Cruke was born in 1350, in South Tawton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. She married John Burnell in 1370, in South Tawton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1408, in South Tawton, Devon, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine de Cruke est née en 1350, à South Tawton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John Burnell en 1370, à South Tawton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1408, à South Tawton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Crukeは1350年にイギリスイギリスデボンソウス タウトンで生まれた。1370年にイギリスイギリスデボンソウス タウトンでJohn Burnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1408年にイギリスデボンソウス タウトンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Cruke(은)는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 소우스 타w턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 소우스 타w턴에서 John Burnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 영국 데폰 소우스 타w턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine de Cruke родилась в 1350 г. в местности соут тавтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Burnell в 1370 г. в местности соут тавтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1408 г. в местности соут тавтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.
